name: agentic-sdlc-codex-plugin
description: Codex plugin for contract-driven delivery, verified assessments, and visual project lineage.

scripts.check: node --check bin/agentic-sdlc.mjs && node --check scripts/generate-plugin-assets.mjs && node --check lib/context-optimization.mjs && node --check lib/identity-migration.mjs && node --check lib/rtk-optimization-adapter.mjs && node --check lib/change-observatory/cli.mjs && node --check lib/change-observatory/constants.mjs && node --check lib/change-observatory/index.mjs && node --check lib/change-observatory/intentabi-adapter.mjs && node --check lib/change-observatory/normalizer.mjs && node --check lib/change-observatory/path-safety.mjs && node --check lib/change-observatory/server.mjs && node --check lib/change-observatory/source-reader.mjs && node --check lib/change-observatory/summary-ranking.mjs && node --check lib/trace-narrative.mjs && node --check ui/change-observatory/api.js && node --check ui/change-observatory/app.js && node --check ui/change-observatory/components.js && node --check ui/change-observatory/model.js

author: Antonio Antenore
